content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(modular_monolith)
C: team_size(6) ∧ part_time_devOps ∧ timeline(4_months) ∧ store(PostgreSQL)
H: simplicity_in_deployment ∧ ease_of_collaboration ∧ low_overhead_for_initial_setup ⇒ prefer(modular_monolith)
P: design_core_and_billing_modules → use_shared_database → implement_api_boundaries_between_modules
R: ! potential_scalability_issues ∧ ! inter-module_dependency_complexity ∧ ! limited_isolation_in_failure_scenarios
A: focus_on_mvp_delivery ∧ iterate_on_user_feedback ∧ prepare_for_future_split

[AUDIT]
Chosen architecture balances speed and complexity.

structured_data.audit: Chosen architecture balances speed and complexity.
